name: 1b-fix-vitest
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec vitest run tests/unit/admin/svg-editor/svgPipelineRunner.test.ts tests/unit/admin/svg-editor/svgPhase1Completion.test.ts --no-watch --config vitest.site.config.ts 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'PASS|FAIL|passed|failed|deterministic|svgPipelineRunner' | Select -First 10 ; echo 'VITEST_DONE'
